description: Add RSI oversold confirmation for BUY signals - only trigger pullback/breakout entries when RSI < 35
rationale: RSI oversold confirmation should improve BUY signal quality by filtering for higher probability reversal points. When RSI < 35, price is technically oversold and more likely to bounce. This reduces false breakouts and improves entry timing for pullback strategies. Expected to increase win rate while reducing total trades.

description: Add volume spike confirmation for BUY signals - only trigger when H1 tick_volume is above 1.5x recent average
rationale: Volume spikes often indicate institutional interest and can improve entry timing. By requiring tick_volume > 1.5x recent average, we filter for moves with conviction rather than low-volume false breakouts. This should increase win rate by avoiding weak signals while maintaining reasonable trade frequency.

description: BUY when price pulls back to lower Bollinger Band (oversold) but stays above EMA20 in bullish H4 trend
rationale: Bollinger Bands identify oversold conditions more dynamically than fixed EMA levels. When price touches the lower band but stays above EMA20, it suggests a controlled pullback in an uptrend - a high-probability BUY setup. This adds a third entry condition alongside existing EMA pullback and breakout signals, potentially capturing more profitable entries during volatile pullbacks.
reason: Exceeds all thresholds: win_rate 88.2% vs 67.6% min, pnl $145.69 vs $88.40 min, drawdown 0.01% vs 0.026% max, 17 trades adequate

description: Add MACD bullish momentum confirmation for BUY signals - only enter when MACD line crosses above signal line
rationale: MACD crossover provides momentum confirmation for entries, filtering out false signals during weak momentum periods. Combined with existing Bollinger Band logic for comprehensive entry conditions. Should improve win rate by only taking trades when momentum is clearly turning bullish.
reason: PnL regression (-$12.37 < $145.69 baseline) and too few signals (2 trades < 5 minimum)

description: Add Stochastic %K < 20 oversold confirmation for BUY signals in bullish trends
rationale: Stochastic oscillator identifies true oversold conditions (%K < 20) which often precede strong bounces in uptrends. Combined with existing Bollinger pullback logic, this should filter for higher-probability BUY entries when price is both technically oversold (Bollinger) and momentum-oversold (Stochastic). The 20 threshold is aggressive enough to catch good entries but not too restrictive.
reason: PnL $24.18 <= baseline $145.69 - fails rule 2 requiring >$8 improvement above baseline

description: Replace single EMA fast/slow with 3-EMA ribbon for stronger trend confirmation
rationale: 3-EMA ribbon provides stronger trend confirmation by requiring all EMAs to align in order. This should reduce false signals during choppy periods while maintaining sensitivity to genuine trends. The middle EMA acts as a filter between fast/slow, creating more stringent entry conditions that could improve win rate.
reason: PnL dropped from $145.69 to $108.44 (-$37.25), violating rule 2 which requires new_pnl > baseline_pnl + 8.0

description: Add momentum divergence filter using price-momentum comparison over last 5 H1 bars to confirm BUY signals
rationale: Momentum divergence filter compares price momentum vs EMA momentum over 5 bars to confirm signal strength. This should reduce false breakouts by ensuring underlying momentum supports the entry direction. For bearish H4 trends, requires strong reversal momentum to generate counter-trend BUY signals in long-only mode.
reason: PnL of $80.11 is below baseline $145.69 - fails rule #2 requiring improvement of at least $8

description: Replace fixed ATR-based SL/TP with dynamic Chandelier Exit system that trails stops based on highest high/lowest low over lookback period
rationale: Chandelier Exit system should capture more profit in strong trends by trailing stops dynamically based on market structure rather than fixed ATR distances. This allows winners to run longer while still protecting against reversals, potentially improving both PnL and win rate in trending markets.
reason: Win rate dropped 47% (88.2% to 41.2%) and PnL dropped $100.43 ($145.69 to $45.26) - both massive regressions below baseline

description: Add volatility regime filter using ATR percentile ranking - only take BUY signals when ATR is in top 30% of recent range (high volatility favors trend continuation)
rationale: High volatility periods often indicate strong directional moves and better trend continuation probability. By filtering for ATR in top 30% of recent range, we avoid low-volatility chop and focus on high-momentum breakouts that are more likely to reach profit targets.
reason: PnL $32.01 <= baseline $145.69 - fails rule 2 (must improve PnL by at least $8)
